mapper.sql: id, username, email, password, role, avatar, gender, gender_custom, birthday, enabled, session_token, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, email, password, role, avatar, gender, gender_custom, birthday, enabled, session_token, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{role}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{genderCustom}, #{birthday}, #{enabled}, #{sessionToken}, #{createdAt})
